name: Garlic Scallop Saute
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Milk or enough to cover
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash scallops thoroughly to remove sand.
2. Place in a small bowl and cover with milk. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Drain well and coat with flour. Shake off excess flour and set aside.
4. Melt butter in a large skillet, add oil, and sauté half the garlic for a few seconds.
5. Add mushrooms, shallots, and remaining garlic to the skillet. Stir constantly until cooked.
6. Add scallops and lemon juice; cook for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until scallops are just done.
7. Remove scallops to serving platter and keep warm.
8. Add a dash of sherry and deglaze the pan by scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the skillet.
9. Pour over scallops and serve.
